headline: SuperDS Announces Expansion of Multi-Supplier Listing Automation and Inventory Management Infrastructure for eBay Sellers
summary: Tel Aviv, Israel--(Newsfile Corp. - May 16, 2026) - SuperDS, an eBay dropshipping automation platform, announced the expansion of its multi-supplier listing automation and inventory management infrastructure aimed at supporting sellers operating larger and more complex product catalogs.According to the company, the expansion introduces updated supplier synchronization processes, enhanced inventory monitoring capabilities, and broader automation support for multi-supplier workflows within eBay...
